Part.Source:
Event Start
loadwwpContext.Call(&Context) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPVEICULOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 4, &AutNiv) RetornaufFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &VeiUfeCod, &VeiCidCod) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &ErroMensagem = ''
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiProIe.TooltipText = "Inscrição estadual" &CorCod.Visible = False &VeiMarCod.Visible = False &VeiCidCod.Visible = False &VeiUfeCod.Visible = False &VeiPla.TooltipText = "Placa do veículo" WWPActions.Mask_Apply(&VeiPla.InternalName, !"SSS-AA00", False, False) Do 'LoadComboVeiUfeCod' Do 'LoadComboVeiCidCod' Do 'LoadComboVeiMarCod' Do 'LoadComboCorCod'
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &VeiCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
txtSinTEGRA.LinkTarget = '_blank' txtSinTEGRA.Link = 'http://www.sintegra.gov.br/'
txtANTT.LinkTarget = '_blank' txtANTT.Link = 'https://consultapublica.antt.gov.br/Site/ConsultaRNTRC.aspx/ConsultaPublica/'
if &OqueFazer = 'INS' &sdtVeiculo.VeiStsEfr = Status_EFrete.Pendente endif
&VeiAnoFab.clear() for &forItem = &Today.Year() to 1950 step -1 &VeiAnoFab.AddItem(&forItem,&forItem.ToString()) endfor
&VeiAnoMod.clear() for &forItem = &Today.Year() + 1 to 1950 step -1 &VeiAnoMod.AddItem(&forItem, &forItem.ToString()) endfor
do 'LoadDataVeiculo'
EndEvent
Event Combo_CorCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CorCod.FromString(Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_get)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiMarCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiMarCod.FromString(Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_get)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiCidCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiCidCod.FromString(Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_get)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Combo_VeiUfeCod.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VeiUfeCod = Combo_VeiUfeCod.SelectedValue_get
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
do 'LoadComboVeiCidCod' Msg('Trocou de UF')
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &VeiPla.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', '', DVMessageType.error, &VeiPla.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiMod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Modelo'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiMod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiUfeCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','UF'), DVMessageType.error, Combo_VeiUfeCod.DDOInternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiCidCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Cidade'), DVMessageType.error, Combo_VeiCidCod.DDOInternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiMarCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Marca'), DVMessageType.error, Combo_VeiMarCod.DDOInternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &CorCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Cor'), DVMessageType.error, Combo_CorCod.DDOInternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiTip.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Veículo'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiTip.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiTipRod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Rodado'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiTipRod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &VeiTipCarr.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Carroceria'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiTipCarr.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiTip = VeiculoTipo.Tracao or &VeiTip = VeiculoTipo.Reboque) AND &VeiTar.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Tara'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiTar.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (val(&VeiTip) = 3) AND &VeiCap.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Capacidade mensagem alterada', DVMessageType.error, &VeiCap.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiPro <> 'P') AND &VeiProRaz.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Nome'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiProRaz.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiPro <> 'P') AND &VeiProCnpj.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','CPF/CNPJ'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiProCnpj.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiPro <> 'P') AND &VeiProIe.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','I.E.'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiProIe.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiPro <> 'P') AND &VeiProRNTRC.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','RNTRC'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiProRNTRC.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&VeiPro <> 'P') AND &VeiProUf.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','UF'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiProUf.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &VeiTip = VeiculoTipo.Tracao or &VeiTip = VeiculoTipo.Reboque VeiTar_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiTar_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If val(&VeiTip) = 3 VeiCap_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiCap_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &VeiPro <> 'P' VeiProRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiProRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &VeiPro <> 'P' VeiProCnpj_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiProCnpj_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &VeiPro <> 'P' VeiProRNTRCMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiProRNTRCMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &VeiPro <> 'P' VeiProUf_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiProUf_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &VeiPro <> 'P' VeiProIeMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell' Else VeiProIeMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf
TableAdicionais.Visible = (&VeiPro <> 'P')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboCorCod'
&CorCod_Data = new()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//&CorCod initial value has to be loaded manually at the beginning of this Subrutine For Each Where EmpCod = &EmpCod &Combo_DataItem = new() &Combo_DataItem.ID = CorCod.ToString().Trim() &Combo_DataItem.Title = CorNom &CorCod_Data.Add(&Combo_DataItem) EndFor Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = iif(&CorCod.IsEmpty(), '', &CorCod.ToString().Trim())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &OqueFazer = 'INS' and &CorCod_Data.Count > 0 Combo_CorCod.SelectedValue_set = &CorCod_Data.Item(1).ID endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiMarCod'
&VeiMarCod_Data = new() // if 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//&VeiMarCod initial value has to be loaded manually at the beginning of this Subrutine For Each Where EmpCod = &EmpCod &Combo_DataItem = new() &Combo_DataItem.ID = VeiMarCod.ToString().Trim() &Combo_DataItem.Title = VeiMarNom &VeiMarCod_Data.Add(&Combo_DataItem) EndFor Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = iif(&VeiMarCod.IsEmpty(), '', &VeiMarCod.ToString().Trim())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
// Else // For Each MarcaVeiculo Order EmpCod, VeiMarCod // Where EmpCod = 5 // &Combo_DataItem = new() // &Combo_DataItem.ID = VeiMarCod.ToString() // &Combo_DataItem.Title = VeiMarNom.ToString() // &VeiMarCod_Data.Add(&Combo_DataItem) // EndFor // Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = iif(&VeiMarCod.IsEmpty(), '', &VeiMarCod.ToString().Trim()) // Endif // if &OqueFazer = 'INS' and &VeiMarCod_Data.Count > 0 Combo_VeiMarCod.SelectedValue_set = &VeiMarCod_Data.Item(1).ID endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiCidCod'
&VeiCidCod_Data = new()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//&VeiCidCod initial value has to be loaded manually at the beginning of this Subrutine For Each Where UfeCod = &VeiUfeCod and EmpCod = &EmpCod &Combo_DataItem = new() &Combo_DataItem.ID = CidCod.ToString().Trim() &Combo_DataItem.Title = CidNom &VeiCidCod_Data.Add(&Combo_DataItem) EndFor Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = iif(&VeiCidCod.IsEmpty(), '', &VeiCidCod.ToString().Trim())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if &OqueFazer = 'INS' and &VeiCidCod_Data.Count > 0 Combo_VeiCidCod.SelectedValue_set = &VeiCidCod_Data.Item(1).ID endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadComboVeiUfeCod'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//&VeiUfeCod initial value has to be loaded manually at the beginning of this Subrutine For Each Where EmpCod = &EmpCod &Combo_DataItem = new() &Combo_DataItem.ID = UfeCod &Combo_DataItem.Title = UfeCod &VeiUfeCod_Data.Add(&Combo_DataItem) EndFor Combo_VeiUfeCod.SelectedValue_set = &VeiUfeCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Show Messages'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Code block: ShowMessages For &Message in &Messages msg(&Message.Description) endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
do 'validar'
if &CheckRequiredFieldsResult &sdtVeiculo.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiCod = &VeiCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiPla = &VeiPla &sdtVeiculo.VeiMod = &VeiMod &sdtVeiculo.VeiUfeCod = &VeiUfeCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiMarCod = &VeiMarCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiAnoFab = &VeiAnoFab &sdtVeiculo.VeiAnoMod = &VeiAnoMod &sdtVeiculo.VeiUltKm = &VeiUltKm &sdtVeiculo.VeiCha = &VeiCha &sdtVeiculo.VeiComb = &VeiComb &sdtVeiculo.VeiCidCod = &VeiCidCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiRen = &VeiRen &sdtVeiculo.CorCod = &CorCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiObs = &VeiObs &sdtVeiculo.VeiPro = &VeiPro &sdtVeiculo.VeiTip = &VeiTip &sdtVeiculo.VeiTipCarr = &VeiTipCarr &sdtVeiculo.VeiTipRod = &VeiTipRod &sdtVeiculo.VeiTar = &VeiTar &sdtVeiculo.VeiCap = &VeiCap &sdtVeiculo.VeiCapM3 = &VeiCapM3 &sdtVeiculo.VeiNroEixo = &VeiNroEixo &sdtVeiculo.VeiProCod = &VeiProCod &sdtVeiculo.VeiProRaz = &VeiProRaz &sdtVeiculo.VeiProRNTRC = &VeiProRNTRC &sdtVeiculo.VeiProCnpj = &VeiProCnpj &sdtVeiculo.VeiProIe = &VeiProIe &sdtVeiculo.VeiProUf = &VeiProUf &sdtVeiculo.VeiStsEfr = &VeiStsEfr &sdtVeiculo.VeiNfeProCod = &VeiNfeProCod
GravarVeiculos.Call('INS',&EmpCod,&sdtVeiculo)
return endif
EndEvent
Event &VeiProCod.IsValid
if &VeiProCod <> 0 // search data proprietario RetonaProprietarioVeiculo.call(&EmpCod,&VeiProCod,&VeiProCnpj,&VeiProRaz,&VeiProIe,&VeiProUf,&VeiProRNTRC) endif
EndEvent
Event &VeiTip.IsValid
do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &VeiPro.IsValid
do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &VeiPla.IsValid
if &VeiPla.IsEmpty() msg( DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Error!", "The name is required" ,DVMessageType.error,!"#" + &VeiPla.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) &VeiRen = 'placa está vazia' Endif
EndEvent
Event &VeiMod.IsValid
RetiraCaracteresEspeciais.Call(&VeiMod,&VeiMod)
EndEvent
Event &VeiProUf.IsValid
RetiraCaracteresEspeciais.Call(&VeiProUf,&VeiProUf)
EndEvent
Sub 'validar'
do 'CheckRequiredFields'
if not &VeiPla.Trim().IsEmpty() VerificaPlacaRepetida.Call(&EmpCod, &VeiCod,&VeiPla,&Mensagem) if not &Mensagem.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Placa'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiPla.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &Message = new() &Message.Description = 'Mensagem de erro: placa ja existe' &Message.Type = MessageTypes.Error &Messages.Add(&Message) do 'Show Messages' &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false endif endif
if not &VeiRen.Trim().IsEmpty() VerificaRenavamRepetido.Call(&EmpCod, &VeiCod, &VeiRen, &Mensagem) if not &Mensagem.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Renavam'), DVMessageType.error, &VeiRen.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Renavam é necessário', DVMessageType.error, &VeiRen.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false endif endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadDataVeiculo'
if &OqueFazer = 'UPD' or &OqueFazer = 'DEL' for each Veiculos order EmpCod, VeiCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where VeiCod = &parVeiCod &VeiPla = VeiPla &VeiMod = VeiMod &VeiUfeCod = VeiUfeCod &VeiMarCod = VeiMarCod &VeiAnoFab = VeiAnoFab &VeiAnoMod = VeiAnoMod &VeiUltKm = VeiUltKm &VeiCha = VeiCha &VeiCidCod = VeiCidCod &VeiRen = VeiRen &CorCod = CorCod &VeiObs = VeiObs &VeiPro = VeiPro &VeiTip = VeiTip &VeiTipCarr = VeiTipCarr &VeiTipRod = VeiTipRod &VeiTar = VeiTar &VeiCap = VeiCap &VeiCapM3 = VeiCapM3 &VeiNroEixo = VeiNroEixo &VeiProCod = VeiProCod &VeiProRaz = VeiProRaz &VeiProRNTRC = VeiProRNTRC &VeiProCnpj = VeiProCnpj &VeiProIe = VeiProIe &VeiProUf = VeiProUf exit endfor if &OqueFazer = 'DEL' &VeiUfeCod.Enabled = false &VeiMarCod.Enabled = false &VeiAnoFab.Enabled = false &VeiAnoMod.Enabled = false &VeiUltKm.Enabled = false &VeiCha.Enabled = false &VeiCidCod.Enabled = false &VeiRen.Enabled = false &CorCod.Enabled = false &VeiObs.Enabled = false &VeiPro.Enabled = false &VeiTip.Enabled = false &VeiTipCarr.Enabled = false &VeiTipRod.Enabled = false &VeiTar.Enabled = false &VeiCap.Enabled = false &VeiCapM3.Enabled = false &VeiNroEixo.Enabled = false &VeiProCod.Enabled = false &VeiProRaz.Enabled = false &VeiProRNTRC.Enabled = false &VeiProCnpj.Enabled = false &VeiProIe.Enabled = false &VeiProUf.Enabled = false endif endif
EndSub
